notes: v0.16.81 — CHAIN LINKS difficulty nerf across all levels. The whole encounter was too punishing — especially COLOR MATCH where the centre indicator swapped target every 0.94 s regardless of difficulty (impossible to track on EASY). Now: COLOR MATCH target swap scales with diff (EASY 3.5 s → BRUTAL 0.9 s); pad HP reduced to 40+10·diff+6·round (was 60+20·diff+12·round); rounds-to-clear scaled EASY 3 / NORM 4 / HARD-BRUTAL 5; wrong-target dmg 4/6/8/10 (was flat 8); orbiter cadence + speed + dmg all scaled per diff. Pads die in 3-4 shots on EASY now. Mini-boss empty-arena report under investigation. Practice-mode rift trainer + left-nav PCB skin port land in v0.16.82. Windows only.
